utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified: (1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists physical and mental health each with a plan name and monthly cost, so fully specified. (2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan has home_contents with a plan and monthly cost; that satisfies home/contents insurance with costs. (3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan provides a core travel plan and multiple add-ons each with monthly costs; this is fully specified. (4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan includes a preventive care add-on with a cost, so specified. (5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan includes both monthly and annual totals. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each plan name from the final coverage plan to the corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Physical Health Plan (maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan), LifeFirst Standard Mental Health Plan (maps to primary_health_coverage.mental_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan), LifeFirst Standard Coverage for home contents (maps to property_protection.home_content -> LifeFirst Standard Coverage), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (maps to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance -> PrimeTravel Premium Plan), Premium Medical Network Add-on (maps to travel_enhancement_services -> Premium Medical Network), 24/7 Travel Assistance Add-on (maps to travel_enhancement_services -> 24/7 Travel Assistance), Business Travel Support Add-on (maps to travel_enhancement_services -> Business Travel Support), and Preventive Care Package Add-on (maps to health_enhancement_services -> Preventive Care Package). I then extracted each exact rating number.
